commands.name: docx
commands.description:
Runs the Markdown to DOCX conversion. Only supports a subset of
features compared to the PDF conversion.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

commands.name: pdf
commands.description: (Default Verb) Runs the full Markdown to PDF conversion.

commands.name: set-theme
commands.description: Sets the theme that will be used for all conversions.

commands.name: update
commands.description:
Updates to the latest version, by using the dotnet tools update
command.
